priority_actions.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins

watch_items.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
Guest experience outpaces formal trust record

implementation_framework.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
implementation_framework.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score
implementation_framework.success_measure: FSA rating maintained or improved on next inspection (verifiable via FSA API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the last FSA inspection report. Address each specific point. When ready, request a re-inspection via your local authority

implementation_framework.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
implementation_framework.success_measure: Menu URL present in GBP profile (verifiable via Google Places API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Log into business.google.com → select venue → Info → Menu URL → paste link to your current menu page on your website
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: marketing — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
implementation_framework.success_measure: GBP completeness ≥ 9/10 with menu and hours complete (verifiable via API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Open your Google Maps listing on your phone. Check: (1) hours for all 7 days, (2) menu link works, (3) phone number dials correctly, (4) website loads. Fix any gaps via business.google.com
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: operations — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
implementation_framework.success_measure: Overall score percentile improved vs local peers (verifiable via next scoring run)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the 3 competitor profiles listed in this report. Note what they do on Google that you don't. Pick one gap to close this week
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: management — whoever currently responds to online reviews

implementation_framework.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible
implementation_framework.success_measure: FSA rating maintained or improved on next inspection (verifiable via FSA API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the last FSA inspection report. Address each specific point. When ready, request a re-inspection via your local authority

implementation_framework.title: Protect the 4.8/5 rating — it took years to build
implementation_framework.success_measure: Google rating maintained or improved vs current baseline (verifiable via gr field)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Respond to the 3 most recent Google reviews (positive and negative) this week. Set a weekly review-response routine
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: front-of-house — whoever currently responds to online reviews

implementation_framework.success_measure: FSA rating maintained or improved on next inspection (verifiable via FSA API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the last FSA inspection report. Address each specific point. When ready, request a re-inspection via your local authority

implementation_framework.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
implementation_framework.success_measure: Google review count increased by 10+ (verifiable via grc field)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Identify the single most actionable sub-task and assign it to a named person with a deadline
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: marketing — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead

data_quality.note: Honest segment attribution from keyword evidence. Reviews without clear guest-type signals are unattributed.

subcomponents.label: Inspection Recency
subcomponents.interpretation: Last inspected 2024-06-18 (22 months ago). Meaningful score drag. Consider proactive action. The system discounts older inspections because they carry less certainty.

biggest_drag.label: Inspection Recency
biggest_drag.interpretation: Last inspected 2024-06-18 (22 months ago). Meaningful score drag. Consider proactive action. The system discounts older inspections because they carry less certainty.

headline_gap.gap_explanation: Customers see 4/5 — below top mark. This is visible and actively affects customer decisions.

reinspection.reasoning: Your inspection is 22 months old (stale tier). The recency decay is costing you ~1.9 points on trust. A fresh 4/5 result would recover this immediately and put you ahead of 1 local peers on trust.
reinspection.cost_context: Voluntary reinspection is free via local authority request. Typical wait: 4–8 weeks.
reinspection.risk_note: Only request reinspection if confident of maintaining 4/5. A drop to 3 would be worse than the staleness drag.

trust_building_actions.action: Address specific inspection points before requesting re-inspection

commercial_exposure.scenario: An FSA rating of 4/5 is visible to customers and actively suppresses trust. This is a direct revenue factor.
commercial_exposure.basis: Sub-5 ratings are visible on FSA website and Google, affecting booking decisions.

upside_if_fixed.risk: Only request reinspection if confident of maintaining 4/5. A drop to 3 would be worse than the staleness drag.

tier_1_deep_analysis.description: Full text analysed — aspect tagging, sentiment, segment classification
tier_1_deep_analysis.what_this_tells_you: Detailed theme and sentiment patterns from recent guests. Strong for identifying specific issues and praise points. Not a census.
tier_1_deep_analysis.confidence: High for recent themes, moderate for long-term patterns

tier_2_aggregate_signals.description: Rating and volume statistics — no text analysis
tier_2_aggregate_signals.rating_stability: A 4.8/5 across 294 reviews is stable — sustained patterns needed to shift the average.
tier_2_aggregate_signals.what_this_tells_you: Overall reputation trajectory. A 4.8/5 across 294 reviews is stable — sustained patterns needed to shift the average.
tier_2_aggregate_signals.confidence: High for reputation baseline, cannot identify specific themes

tier_3_structural_signals.description: Non-review data — FSA, GBP completeness, operational signals
tier_3_structural_signals.what_this_tells_you: Compliance, discoverability, and operational readiness. Independent of guest opinion.
